title: AtlasManifest
description: Atlas-pack manifest authored by content packs (and the AI generation pipeline). Lists every entity to be packed at publish time by `npm run pack:build`. Producer-side contract pinned in docs/architecture/atlas-pipeline.md. Renderer consumes the per-entity `<entityId>.atlas.json` files produced from this manifest, not this manifest itself.

$schema.description: Must match the `$id` form of the atlas schema. Editors and AI generators emit the canonical ID so validators can resolve the schema without filesystem walking.

packId.description: Pack identifier this manifest belongs to. Must match `id` from the pack's `manifest.json`.

packerOptions.description: Pinned packer flags applied to every entity in this pack. Identical inputs + identical flags must produce byte-identical outputs across machines.

maxPageSize.description: Atlas page-size cap. Must not exceed the renderer's per-animation cap (4096×4096) from renderer-technology-choice.md § Per-Animation Budget.

padding.description: Pixel padding between sprites on the atlas page.

trim.description: Whether to trim transparent pixels around source frames. Default false; when true, frame metadata records the trim offsets.

powerOfTwo.description: Force atlas page dimensions to powers of two. Default true to match WebGL2 mipmap support.

entityId.description: Stable entity identifier. Output files are written as `<pack>/atlases/<entityId>.png` and `<pack>/atlases/<entityId>.atlas.json`.

frameSourcesGlob.description: Pack-relative glob matching the per-frame PNGs to be packed for this entity. Conventionally `sprites/<entityId>/*.png`. Files are sorted lexicographically by absolute pack-relative path before packing for determinism.

overrides.description: Per-entity overrides for `packerOptions`. Optional. Any field omitted inherits from the manifest-level `packerOptions`.
